tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include cargo check compilation (test_compiles), cargo test execution (test_repo_display_tests, test_slash_star_display), cargo clippy (test_repo_clippy), and cargo fmt (test_repo_fmt). test_not_tautological.reason: test_slash_star_display injects and runs Rust snapshot assertions that check the actual rendered output of callable types. A stub or no-op implementation would produce wrong output (e.g., '(a, *, /, x, y) -> None' instead of '(a, /, *, x, y) -> None') and fail the snapshot comparison. The bug fix is required to pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: instruction.md requires '/' before '*' in callable display, gives examples like '(a, /, *, x, y) -> None' and '(p, q, /, *, k) -> None', and mentions AGENTS.md guidelines. All these are tested: snapshot tests for the display ordering, and dedicated tests for panic/unwrap, local imports, and allow vs expect.
